title: rubus fruticosus var. corylifolius
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. corylifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry vine, is a plant species belonging to the Rubus genus, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruits. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus var. corylifolius include the potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional recipes and dietary supplements.
